title: Shri Guru Kottureshwara Temple
tagline: Shri Guru Kottureshwara Temple — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Shri Guru Kottureshwara Shrine at Kotturu is an ancient shrine located at Kotturu taluk, Vijayanagara District, North Karnataka, India, 583134.
overview.description: Shri Guru Kottureshwara Shrine at Kotturu is an ancient shrine located at Kotturu taluk, Vijayanagara District, North Karnataka, India, 583134. This temple is 19 km from Kudligi, 28 km from Harapanahalli, 70 km from Davanagere and 253 km from Bengaluru.

topPlaces.name: Kotturu, Karnataka
topPlaces.description: Kotturu is a town and taluk located in the Vijayanagara district of Karnataka, India. It is known as the home of Guru Kottureshwara, a 15th-century Shaivite saint.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shri Guru Kottureshwara Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shri Guru Kottureshwara Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shri Guru Kottureshwara Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Bellary Airport (81 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (130 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shri Guru Kottureshwara Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shri Guru Kottureshwara Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shri Guru Kottureshwara Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Shri Guru Kottureshwara Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shri Guru Kottureshwara Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kotturu, Karnataka, Sirinayakanahalli, Harakanahalu, Davanagere.
